meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance SaaS Pricing: Solve 'Can't Finish' Projects Fast
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on freelance projects. Learn how to master SaaS pricing strategy and use AI tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and earn more.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing feature creep. The secret to finishing projects is a rigid, value-based SaaS pricing model that forces scope containment. Use Antigravity to scaffold your architecture and Claude Code to iterate. By pricing by value rather than hourly, you incentivize efficiency, ensuring you ship, deploy, and get paid.
content.intro:
The screen glows at 2:00 AM, a graveyard of half-baked repositories and unfinished client dashboards. You’ve mastered the stack, but you’re trapped in the '90% done' purgatory, bleeding billable hours into endless revisions. The culprit isn't your code; it’s your pricing model. When you charge for time, you invite scope creep; when you charge for value, you buy your freedom.

Today, we pivot. We are replacing the 'hourly grind' with a high-velocity SaaS deployment framework. By integrating Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for intelligent implementation, we turn your freelance bottleneck into a repeatable, automated revenue machine. Let’s finish what you started.

steps.title: Define Value-Based Pricing Tiers
steps.description: Establish a pricing structure that rewards speed, not hours. This forces you to define clear scope boundaries before writing a single line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a SaaS pricing model template that focuses on three tiers: MVP, Growth, and Enterprise. Include logic for feature-gating based on user roles.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate pricing-model.ts with stripe integration logic'

steps.title: Scaffold the MVP Architecture
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a production-ready boilerplate, ensuring you aren't reinventing the wheel on auth or database schemas.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Next.js SaaS architecture including Supabase auth, Stripe checkout session handling, and a protected dashboard route.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize project with provided antigravity boilerplate'

steps.title: Automate Feature Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your pricing tiers to actual code logic, ensuring that your tier-based restrictions are enforced globally.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a middleware function that checks the user's Stripe subscription status and restricts access to premium API endpoints.

steps.title: Set Up Automated Deployment
steps.description: Remove deployment friction. If you can't ship with one command, you won't finish. Configure CI/CD to handle production readiness.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and deployment to Vercel for this SaaS repository.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure github actions for production deployment'

steps.title: Client Handoff & Documentation
steps.description: Automate the creation of a 'Project README' that explains the value of the SaaS structure to the client, justifying your premium pricing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a professional project documentation file that outlines the SaaS features, pricing model, and maintenance instructions for a non-technical client.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate README.md with client-facing instructions'

pro_tips: Always bill 50% upfront to filter out 'tire-kicker' clients who don't respect your workflow.
Use 'Feature Toggles' to hide incomplete features so you can ship the core product immediately.
Never offer 'unlimited revisions'—build a 'change request' fee into your contract to prevent scope creep.
Leverage Claude Code to write your unit tests; it reduces your debugging time by 40% during the final polish.
Keep your SaaS boilerplate in a private GitHub template repository for instant project instantiation.
content.next_steps: Once the MVP is deployed, schedule a feedback session with your client. Use the automated data logs generated by your new SaaS structure to prove the value of your work and upsell a monthly maintenance retainer.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the strategy to stop being a coder and start being a SaaS architect. The only thing missing is your first commit. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
